phases.name: Migration Drift Ledger Continuation
phases.objective: Finish Batch C ledger and RPC privilege owner decision before any migration apply.

phases.name: Realtime Design
phases.objective: Resolve publication/subscription drift by design before any SQL or frontend changes.

phases.name: U-Reward Performance Apply
phases.objective: Dry-run and conditionally apply approved summary/history RPC optimization.

phases.name: Migration Reconciliation
phases.objective: Resolve Batch C, Batch D, skipped legacy filenames, and future schema-history reconciliation.

phases.name: Security Advisor Triage
phases.objective: Classify broad Supabase security backlog into scoped safe tasks.

phases.name: Service Layer Refactor
phases.objective: Split product service hub after backend contracts stabilize.

Lane_01: PWA UI/routes/service refactor after backend contract lock
Lane_02: Product/domain semantics, U-Reward/Wallet/TAO acceptance, roadmap priority
NTS: Approval for production apply, schema_migrations repair, broad/high-risk migration actions
